summary: Comprehensive testing of site settings system completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend admin settings page fully functional with all 4 tabs working. Dynamic content updates working across all pages. Minor credential discrepancy noted.
passed_tests: Admin Settings page with 4 tabs (General, Content, Payment, Credentials)
Dynamic site name updates in navigation
Dynamic hero content updates on home page
Dynamic contact email in footer and contact page
Dynamic UPI details on donate page with QR code
Settings form field population and validation
Real-time content updates across all pages
Admin panel navigation and access control
All existing API endpoints (user registration, advocate registration, grant applications, admin moderation)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: The default admin credentials mentioned in review request (admin@admin.com / admin123) don't match actual working credentials (admin@legalguardian.in / Admin@123). Consider updating documentation or creating the new admin user as specified.
